name: Jan Gallo — father (Slovakia, born 1893)
researcher_question: Who was the father of Jan Gallo, born in 1893 in Šútovo, Turany parish, Slovakia (then Suttó, Turány parish, Turócz County, Hungary)?
notes: Thin documented conclusion — the source case study names only the father (given name Andrej, a variant of Ondrej) and a younger brother Ondrej; it never names the mother or gives any dates, so those cannot be findings. Evidence is Turany Lutheran parish church records on FamilySearch microfilm 2062258 (catalog-ordered; Slovak/Hungarian/Latin, largely browse-only, not name-indexed). The weakest fixture of the batch on both ground-truth completeness and recoverability.
